issues_found: No ImageNet experiments. This is the single biggest barrier to acceptance. CIFAR-only is insufficient for 2026 venue standards.
N=3 seeds with 50% TOST pass rate. Null-result paper needs stronger evidence.
Section 5.7 alignment analysis occupies significant space for a double-null finding.
